title: artocarpus tylophyllus
intro: Artocarpus tylophyllus, also known as the Fijian breadfruit, is a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Artocarpus tylophyllus are numerous, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as being effective in treating various infections and wounds. Artocarpus tylophyllus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible medicinal plant.
